sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40843" key="e)piskafeu/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπισκᾰφ-εύς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">έως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n40843.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one</tr_> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">who harrows in the seed</tr_>, Id.</sense> </entryFree>
